title: Adams Weapons
description: this mods add a variety of weapons to the game and their special crafting recipes with custom items like sharpened obsidian and packed iron. And soon it will have... The mighty three!
body:
This mod adds a ton of **weapons** to Minecraft.
All of the weapons can be crafted in survival.
It adds weapons with special abilities that are activatable with right-click.

the **weapons** added are:
- The Obsidian Shortsword
- Adams Axe of Harmony
- Maleks Scythe of Dread
- Salomons Sword of Dignity
- Neils Whip of Pain

The **Special Abilities** are:
- Sword -> send a ranged sword beam at the direction you face.

The **Passive Abilities** are:
- Axe -> gives the slowness effect on hit enemy for 3 seconds.
- Scythe -> gives the _Bleeding_ effect on the hit enemy.

Every weapon is obtainable in survival.

works nicely together with the **Better Combat** mod!

**this mod was made using _MCreator_**

this mod has stoppes development and WONT be updated
